description: If you’re looking for some good ol’ homemade SOUL FOOD, stop by today! We are located inside the Galleria Johnstown Food Court in Johnstown, PA. Our most important ingredient is that our food is MADE WITH LOVE😍 We hope to see y’all soon❤️🖤

layoutDescription: Single-column story scroll: hero type-first (minimal photo), sections separated by generous padding and subtle background shifts; gallery as horizontal scroll strip.
mood: Warm, appetizing, neighborhood favorite — invite hunger and comfort
antiPatterns: No fake Google star widgets unless review_score provided. No SaaS feature grids. Food sites should feel sensory (texture, warmth, appetite), not corporate.
photoInventory: You will receive 12 real Facebook photos: hero = storefront/work sample, gallery slots = additional post photos. Design image areas as 16:9 or 4:3 placeholders.
